author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Giant giant squids have the largest eyes of any living animal, measuring up to 10 inches across to help them detect faint light in the deep ocean.
The giant squid possesses three hearts and blue, copper-based blood, which is more efficient than iron-based blood in cold depths.
